creator: yuripv@FreeBSD.org
text: I have opened https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25164 to clean up this and some other small issues with the man page instead as awk is contributed source and already has means to display version.  -V seems to be OpenBSD specific and was added for compatibility (with previous implementation they had) long time ago.  In any case, let's see what others think about this (review).
